_meta.description: Per-state scraping model definitions for currently active states. Each model describes the primary endpoint or portal, the query strategy, normalization approach, and one or two sample schools taken from the input CSV.

CA.query_template: SELECT facility_name, facility_address, facility_city, facility_state, facility_zip, facility_capacity, facility_telephone_number FROM "5bac6551-4d6c-45d6-93b8-e6ded428d98e" WHERE facility_name ILIKE '%{name_variant}%' AND facility_city ILIKE '%{city}%' LIMIT 10
CA.matching_strategy: Generate name variants from abbreviations and suffix stripping, then score by name token overlap and city equality.

CT.query_template: SELECT name, address2, address3, city, statecode, zipcode, phone, minimumage, maximumage, maximumcapacity WHERE caseless_contains(name, '{name_variant}') AND caseless_one_of(city, '{city}')
CT.matching_strategy: Generate name variants, then score by token overlap, city equality, and presence of capacity.

DC.query_template: Open the DC facility search URL with the search parameter set to each normalized provider-name variant, then rank returned facilities by name overlap and Washington/DC context.
DC.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded provider-name variants in the query parameter and score returned facilities by exact token overlap and DC city match.

DE.query_template: SELECT resource_name, site_street_address, site_city, site_state, site_zip_code, phone_number, age_range, capacity WHERE caseless_contains(resource_name, '{name_variant}') AND caseless_one_of(site_city, '{city}')
DE.matching_strategy: Generate name variants from abbreviations and score by resource_name overlap and exact city match.

CO.query_template: SELECT provider_name, street_address, city, state, zip, total_licensed_capacity WHERE caseless_contains(provider_name, '{name_variant}') AND caseless_one_of(city, '{city}')
CO.matching_strategy: Generate name variants from abbreviations and score by provider_name overlap and exact city match.

AZ.query_template: Portal search by provider name and city
AZ.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and city filtering, then rank by exact token overlap in provider search results.

HI.query_template: Portal search by provider/program name and city
HI.matching_strategy: Use expanded name variants; rank by provider name similarity and city/state match.

IL.query_template: Portal search by provider name and city when available
IL.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation expansion heavily for CTR/CDC/SCH style names, then score by city and exact tokens.

MD.query_template: Open city slug page, then match providers within city results using normalized name variants
MD.matching_strategy: Slug city, fetch city-specific result page, and score name overlap against listed providers.

MS.query_template: Portal search by provider name and city
MS.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and city filters, then rank by exact token overlap in portal results.

MI.query_template: Portal search by provider/program name and city
MI.matching_strategy: Use expanded variants and rank by provider name similarity plus city match within Great Start to Quality results.

MN.query_template: Portal search by provider/program name and city
MN.matching_strategy: Use expanded variants and rank by provider name similarity plus city match within Parent Aware results.

NC.query_template: Portal search by facility name and city
NC.matching_strategy: Use expanded variants for DEV/CENTER/CARE abbreviations, then score by city and token overlap.

NH.query_template: Portal search by provider name and city
NH.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and city filters, then rank by exact token overlap in portal results.

NM.query_template: Portal search by provider name and city
NM.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and city filters, then rank by exact token overlap in portal results.

ND.query_template: Portal search by provider/program name and city
ND.matching_strategy: Use normalized variants and exact city filters first because state volume is small.

NV.query_template: Portal search by licensee/provider name and city when available
NV.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and rank by exact token overlap in licensee search results.

NJ.query_template: Portal search by center name and city
NJ.matching_strategy: Use shortened and expanded variants; rank by exact city and distinctive tokens.

OK.matching_strategy: Try direct provider-name variants, then filter rendered results by city.

PA.query_template: SELECT facility_name, facility_address, facility_address_continued, facility_city, facility_state, facility_zip_code, facility_phone, capacity WHERE caseless_one_of(facility_city, '{city}') AND caseless_contains(facility_name, '{name_variant}')
PA.matching_strategy: Use SoQL text filters with facility_name token variants and exact facility_city equality, then score locally by token overlap and city/state match.

SC.query_template: Portal search by provider name and city
SC.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and city filters, then rank by token overlap in portal results.

RI.query_template: Portal search by provider name and city
RI.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and city filters, then rank by exact token overlap in consumer search results.

TN.query_template: Provider map search by name and city
TN.matching_strategy: Use name variants, especially KDGN/CH abbreviations, then match Nashville/other city context.

samples.daycare_name: CRIEVE HALL CH OF CHRIST KDGN

TX.query_template: SELECT operation_name, phone_number, website_address, total_capacity, address_line, city, state, zipcode WHERE caseless_contains(operation_name, "{name_variant}") AND caseless_one_of(city, "{city}")
TX.matching_strategy: Generate multiple name variants and score by operation name, city, state, and provider type fields.

UT.query_template: Fetch JSON resource and filter the returned list by provider name variants and city
UT.matching_strategy: Load the small JSON list and score by provider-name token overlap and exact city match.

VA.query_template: Portal search by provider name; detail pages use cc2.cgi?rm=Details;ID={facility_id}
VA.matching_strategy: Use expanded variants for ST/EPISCOPAL/PRE-SCHOOL style names, then score against city on detail or result rows.

WA.query_template: SELECT providername, licensecapacity, startingage, endingage, primarycontactphonenumber, physicalstreetaddress, physicalcity, physicalstate, physicalzip WHERE caseless_one_of(providername, '{name_variant}') AND caseless_one_of(physicalcity, '{city}')
WA.matching_strategy: Use exact and abbreviation-expanded provider name variants, then score by exact providername and city match.

WV.query_template: Open provider-finder page, follow through to search surface, then search by provider name and city
WV.matching_strategy: Use abbreviation-expanded name variants and city filters after traversing the provider finder workflow.

abbreviation_strategy.goal: Generate broader but still targeted provider-name candidates from abbreviated daycare names before hitting APIs/portals.
rules: Expand common abbreviations like CTR->CENTER, CDC->CHILD DEVELOPMENT CENTER, CH->CHURCH, KDGN->KINDERGARTEN, DEV->DEVELOPMENT, EDUC->EDUCATION, MONSGNR->MONSIGNOR, ST->SAINT.
Strip generic suffixes like DAY CARE, CHILD CARE, CENTER, SCHOOL, HOME, ACADEMY to create relaxed variants.
Try both the original abbreviation and the expanded phrase because some official sources store the short form and some store the long form.
Score candidates with city/state equality first, then token overlap on distinctive words, then capacity/age/address presence as tie-breakers.
